text:
Reflect (lit. , rom. Rifurekushon) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to reflect a single spell cast upon them by a player they have previously met.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell card allows the user to rebound any spell card cast upon them, providing that they have previously met them. This card needs to be used before the user is hit with a spell card. Otherwise it will protect them against the next spell. It has no effect on spells that predate its activation.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1004 :: 
他のプレイヤーからの攻撃呪文をはね返し、効果を相手プレイヤーに返す。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1004 :: Reflection 
Repels the attack from another player and returns the affect to the opponent.
|}
